pipeline_type.description: The type of bioinformatics pipeline to execute.

sample_id.description: Unique identifier for the biological sample.

input_files.description: List of absolute local file paths to the input data (e.g., FASTQ, BAM, TIFF images).

reference_genome.description: Absolute local path to the reference genome or transcriptome directory.

parameters.description: Pipeline-specific parameters (e.g., QC thresholds, spaceranger arguments).

spaceranger_args.description: [TODO: MANUAL REVIEW] Specific arguments for spaceranger count (e.g., slide, area).
